ensures.text: CountLucky(Digits(n)) == CountLucky(Digits(n / 10)) + if IsLuckyDigit(n % 10) then 1 else 0
CountLucky(Digits(n)) == CountLucky(Digits(n / 10)) + if IsLuckyDigit(n % 10) then 1 else 0

assertions.text: forall i: int {:trigger d[i]} :: 0 <= i < |d| ==> IsLuckyDigit(d[i])

invariants.text: count + CountLucky(Digits(temp as nat)) == CountLucky(Digits(num as nat))
flag && AllDigitsLucky(temp as nat) <==> AllDigitsLucky(count as nat)
